headline: Latest News In E-Commerce - WeShop Empowers Creators with UK Founders Programme Launch
summary: WeShop Holdings Limited has announced the launch of its Founders Programme in the United Kingdom, aiming to empower early community creators and enhance the growth of its community-owned social commerce platform. This initiative is designed to involve a select group of 1,000 early members who will receive benefits such as doubled referral rates and invitations to exclusive events. The programme, which aligns with WeShop's vision of community ownership, seeks to accelerate community-led growth...

headline: VHA Deploys Salesforce-Powered Agentic Operating System, Saving Thousands of Staff Hours for Front-Line Veteran Care
summary: SAN FRANCISCO & WASHINGTON, March 26, 2026--Salesforce, the world’s #1 AI CRM, and the Veterans Health Administration (VHA), the nation’s largest integrated healthcare system, today announced the deployment of a new agentic operating system to simplify incident response and improve Veteran care across its more than 150 Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) medical and outpatient centers.

headline: U.S. Department of Labor Taps Agentforce to Enhance Citizen Support
summary: SAN FRANCISCO & WASHINGTON, March 26, 2026--Salesforce, the world’s #1 AI CRM, today announced the U.S. Department of Labor has modernized its National Contact Center (DOL NCC) with Salesforce and is rolling out Agentforce — a suite of autonomous AI agents that reason and take action — to provide more personalized support that meets citizens where they are. headline: Salesforce Resets Executive Pay And Leadership As Shares Trade Below Targets
summary: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) is changing executive pay by skipping salary raises for director-level employees and above, while increasing stock grants and bonuses for top performers. Senior managers and below will still receive merit increases, marking a clear split in how different levels are rewarded. The company is also cutting fewer than 1,000 roles and has named six new leaders to replace five high-profile departures. These moves come as Salesforce trades at $181.96, with the share price...
